name: Persimmon Spice Cake
recipeIngredient: 4 to 6 very ripe, soft persimmons, yielding 1 1/4 cup pureed pulp
1/2 teaspoon each fresh nutmeg and ground cloves
1 teaspoon each orange and lemon zest
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree the persimmons until smooth and stir in baking soda.
2. Mix well; it will set (weird but not to worry).
3. Beat butter and sugar until fluffy.
4. Add egg and persimmon mixture.
5. Combine flour, spices, nuts, and zest; blend well.
6. Spoon batter into a 9-inch greased cake pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for about 40 minutes or more until a knife inserted comes out clean.
8. Before serving, sprinkle with powdered sugar.
This recipe can be increased without adverse effects, except perhaps your waistline. The cake freezes well; avoid powdering sugar until ready to serve.
